title: Nemrileo irm-Drocubac
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image= |name=Nemrileo irm-Drocubac |homeworld=[[Tanjay IV]]''[[The Approaching Storm]]'' |birth= |death=[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The Approaching Storm]]'', which includes Nemrileo irm-Drocubac's [[Death/Legends|death]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. |species=[[Tanjayan]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners=[[Nemrileo irm-Drocubac's wife]] |siblings= |children=*A [[Unidentified child 1 (Nemrileo irm-Drocubac)|child]] *A [[Unidentified child 2 (Nemrileo irm-Drocubac)|child]] |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] *[[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|This places stinks of the working classes. It will hide the smell of treason.|Irm-Drocubac, to the other conspirators|}} '''Nemrileo irm-Drocubac''' was a [[Tanjayan]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] who represented the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tanjay IV]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Republic Senate]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. Irm-Drocubac had a [[Irm-Drocubac family|family]], which included a [[Nemrileo irm-Drocubac's wife|wife]] and [[Unidentified child 1 (Nemrileo irm-Drocubac)|two]] [[Unidentified child 2 (Nemrileo irm-Drocubac)|children]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], the senator was involved in [[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]] [[Presidente/Legends|Presidente]] [[Shu Mai/Legends|Shu Mai's]] plot to have the planet [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]] secede from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. His involvement in the plot led to him being [[Death/Legends|murdered]] by [[Agent/Legends|agents]] loyal to the Separatist movement, who sabotaged a [[Unidentified heavy-equipment delivery vehicle|delivery vehicle]], causing it to crash with his [[Airspeeder/Legends|aircar]], although the crash was later blamed on equipment failure. ==Biography== {{Quote|When they learn what has happened to Tarn Uliss, after what happened to Nemrileo of Tanjay, I don't think any of the others will give us any more trouble.|[[Ansionian]] Senator [[Mousul]], to Shu Mai|}} [[File:Ansion-TEA.jpg|thumb|left|200px|irm-Drocubac was part of a plot to have Ansion secede from the Republic.]] Nemrileo irm-Drocubac was a [[Tanjayan]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who represented his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Tanjay IV]] as a [[Senator/Legends|senator]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Irm-Drocubac began working on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in [[37 BBY/Legends|37 BBY]]''[[The Approaching Storm]]'' states irm-Drocubac had lived and worked on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] for 15 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] prior to his [[Death/Legends|death]], and ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' puts the events of ''[[The Approaching Storm]]'' in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], meaning he served since [[37 BBY/Legends|37 BBY]]. and had lived on world since. By the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], in which many [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] left the Republic to form the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], irm-Drocubac had a [[Nemrileo irm-Drocubac's wife|wife]], [[Unidentified child 1 (Nemrileo irm-Drocubac)|two]] [[Unidentified child 2 (Nemrileo irm-Drocubac)|children]], and resided in a suburb in the [[Bindai District]] on Coruscant. In 22 BBY, irm-Drocubac was a part of [[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]] [[Presidente/Legends|Presidente]] [[Shu Mai/Legends|Shu Mai's]] plot to have the planet [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]] secede from the Republic. During a meeting with several other conspirators, irm-Drocubac expressed his doubts regarding Mai's loyalty to the cause, as well as his concerns about Ansion's secession. While he was later traveling in an [[Airspeeder/Legends|aircar]] in the south quadrant of Coruscant, [[S-93 Area|section ninety-three]] near the suburb where he resided, irm-Drocubac was [[Death/Legends|murdered]] by agents loyal to the Separatist cause. The agents [[Saboteur/Legends|sabotaged]] a [[Unidentified heavy-equipment delivery vehicle|heavy-equipment delivery vehicle]], causing it to collide with his aircar, although the crash was officially attributed to internal guidance software failure in the delivery vehicle.{{CSWECite|II|121|irm-Drocubac, Nemrileo}} Irm-Drocubac's death, combined with the later death of [[Tam Uliss]], a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] industrialist, served as a message to others in the Separatist movement who doubted Mai's loyalty to the cause. After his death, [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] was scheduled to deliver his eulogy, and irm-Drocubac's ashes were to be scattered above [[Galactic City/Legends|Galactic City]], in accordance with Tanjay tradition.{{CSWECite|II|121|irm-Drocubac, Nemrileo}} ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|You talk of committing treason against the treasoners. Don't get your loyalties confused, Nemrileo. Now is not the time.''"
"''You don't have to tell me about time. But this Ansion business is beginning to worry me.|Senator Mousul and Nemrileo irm-Drocubac|}} Nemrileo irm-Drocubac was openly disdainful of the common being, despite the fact his lifestyle was based upon their productivity. He was well respected by his colleagues, co-workers and supporters on his homeworld. Despite being a Republic senator, irm-Drocubac knowingly committed [[Treason/Legends|treason]] by being part of a Separatist conspiracy. irm-Drocubac was also known to distrust Shu Mai's loyalty to the Separatist cause, and had concerns regarding Ansion's secession. ==Behind the scenes== Nemrileo irm-Drocubac first appeared in the [[2002]] novel ''[[The Approaching Storm]]'', written by [[Alan Dean Foster]]. ==Appearances== *''[[The Approaching Storm]]'' {{1st}} *[[The Approaching Storm (abridged audiobook)|''The Approaching Storm'' abridged audiobook]] *{{HoloNetNewsWeb|51|news/13411_6.html|Tanjay IV Representative Dead in Crash}} {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Nemrileo irm-Drocubac |es=Nemrileo irm-Drocubac |pl=Nemrileo irm-Drocubac }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Irm-Drocubac, Nemrileo}} [[Category:Commerce Guild members]] [[Category:Galactic Republic senators]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Tanjayan]]
